## Offer Letter

**TO:** Sarah Chen
**FROM:** CHRO Office (Dr. Evelyn Hartwell)
**RE:** UX Writer / Content Designer — Casual Games Studio
**DATE:** April 30, 2026

Dear Sarah,

We are pleased to offer you the position of **UX Writer / Content Designer** (Senior, L3) with our Casual Games Studio, reporting to **Mei Watanabe, Lead Game Designer**.

### Role Details

| Field            | Value                                           |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| Title            | UX Writer / Content Designer                    |
| Level            | Senior (L3)                                     |
| Team             | Creative Design — Casual Games Studio           |
| Reports To       | Mei Watanabe, Lead Game Designer                |
| Start Date       | June 15, 2026 (negotiable within 2-week window) |
| Work Arrangement | Hybrid (3 days office, 2 days remote)           |

### 90-Day Success Criteria

Your first 90 days will focus on:

1. **Content Audit:** Complete a comprehensive audit of all player-facing text in the current game build, identifying inconsistencies, localization gaps, and clarity issues.
2. **Tone-of-Voice Guide:** Establish a tone-of-voice guide aligned with the Creative Director's visual pillars, approved by the Lead Game Designer and Creative Director.
3. **Tutorial Rewrite:** Rewrite all tutorial copy with measurably improved clarity (playtest comprehension score ≥ 4/5 from 5-user testing).
4. **Localization Handoff:** Deliver a localization-ready content structure for Phase 9 handoff (string key taxonomy, context annotations, text expansion budgets).

### Compensation

Your total compensation package is detailed in the Compensation Package table above. This offer represents our best and final offer — we do not engage in negotiation games. The offer is positioned at the 75th percentile of market rate for your role and seniority.

### At-Will Employment

This is an at-will employment offer. Either party may terminate the employment relationship at any time, with or without cause or advance notice.

### Confidentiality

You will be required to sign our standard Confidentiality and Intellectual Property Assignment Agreement as a condition of employment.

We are excited about the prospect of you joining our team. Your work at King has set the standard for what game UX writing can be, and we believe you will elevate our entire creative design practice.

Sincerely,

**Dr. Evelyn Hartwell**
Chief Human Resources Officer
